title: epipactis atrorubens
intro: Epipactis atrorubens, also known as the purple helleborine, is a type of orchid native to Europe and parts of Asia. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including inflammation and respiratory problems. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it beneficial for relieving congestion and coughs. Epipactis atrorubens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of health benefits and potential interactions.
